text: \nThree sock types A, B, C exist in a drawer. Pulled socks are kept and not returned. Which is true?
answer: If the first three pulls are different socks, only one more pull is needed for a match.
a: If the first two pulls are different socks, only one more pull is needed for a match.
b: If the first three pulls are different socks, only one more pull is needed for a match.
c: If the first two pulls are different socks, at least two more pulls are needed for a match.
d: If the first three pulls are different socks, at least two more pulls are needed for a match.
